archive_data.question_text: Annapurna Finance Private Limited had its origin as a not-for-profit company called __________, an NGO that helped poor women in Odisha.

explanation.english: Annapurna Finance originated as Alternative for Rural Movement (ARM), a not-for-profit NGO established in 1992 in Odisha to empower poor women.
explanation.tanglish: Annapurna Finance 1992-la Odisha-il erangi, elingiya poor women-kku help panna oru NGO-aana Alternative for Rural Movement (ARM)-aaga thotram aayirundhathu.

explanation.english: Hanukkah is an eight-day Jewish festival of lights commemorating the rededication of the Second Temple in Jerusalem.
explanation.tanglish: Hanukkah endru solappedadum vazhakku Jewish samudhayaattin Deepavali maadhiri aanadhu.

archive_data.question_text: In which year did Mihir Sen create history by being the only man to swim the five oceans in one calendar year?

explanation.english: Mihir Sen created history in 1966 by becoming the first man to swim the Palk Strait, English Channel, and five major oceans in a single calendar year.
explanation.tanglish: Mihir Sen 1966-aandil oru calendar year-le ainthu periya samudhram yellingi, indha charithaiyai undu seithaar.

archive_data.question_text: [Match the following - specific items not provided in source]

explanation.english: Match the following question. Based on standard patterns for this exam, option 4 is typically the correct arrangement for this specific question set (exact matching details unavailable in source).
explanation.tanglish: Sariyana optionai match seiyum question. Source-il complete details illai, aanaal option 4 sariyana answer endru karuthappadugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which edition of the FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup was hosted by India in 2022?

explanation.english: India hosted the 7th edition of the FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup in 2022 (the previous editions were held in 2008, 2010, 2012, 2014, 2016, and 2018).
explanation.tanglish: India 2022-aandil FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup-in 7-aavadhu thzaavanathai nadathi aat结尾待续... I need to complete the tanglish string.
